name: Syncro MSP Platform API
what_it_does: Syncro REST API for managed service provider (MSP) combined RMM and PSA platform. Enables AI agents to manage IT support tickets and billing, access device health and inventory data, trigger remote scripts and maintenance tasks, manage customer accounts, handle invoicing and contract management, retrieve SLA metrics, and integrate MSP operations with accounting and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing IT support tickets and routing from MSP helpdesk automation agents
Monitoring device health and triggering maintenance from IT operations agents
Managing customer billing and invoicing from MSP business operations agents
Retrieving SLA compliance metrics from performance reporting agents
not_for: In-house IT departments without managed service provider client billing
Enterprise ITSM without MSP multi-client management workflows
Large MSPs requiring enterprise-scale RMM without SMB MSP focus
best_when: A small to mid-sized MSP using Syncro wants AI agents to automate ticket triage, device monitoring, customer billing, and contract management workflows.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote device access capabilities require strict access controls. Unauthorized access to client systems is a critical security risk with significant legal liability.

auth.notes: Syncro uses API key authentication via Authorization header. Keys are account-scoped with full MSP access across all clients. No granular scope control — treat as highly privileged credential.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 14-day free trial; per-technician pricing with no per-endpoint limit
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-technician monthly pricing; unlimited endpoints per technician
pricing.notes: Portland, Oregon company. Acquired by Naverisk in 2022. Per-technician pricing model — affordable for growing MSPs. Unlimited RMM endpoints included. Popular with small to mid-market MSPs.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Remote access to client devices requires strict authorization controls
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
No granular scopes — API key grants full MSP access across ALL client endpoints
US data residency only — verify for international MSP operations
Acquired by Naverisk 2022 — API roadmap may shift with parent company direction
Per-technician pricing — automation doesn't add per-endpoint cost but still bound by SLA
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: MSP remote access platform. SOC2. API key with no granular scopes — full MSP account access. US data residency. Treat as highly privileged credential.

security_score_components.security_notes: MSP remote access to client endpoints. SOC2. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Highly privileged credential.
